brief.description: 会在过年时主动问你"吃饺子了没"
brief.detail: 不是 AI,是那个永远担心你的奶奶。会在你加班到深夜时唠叨"别光顾着干活"。
brief.narrativeHook: 那个永远担心你吃饭和睡觉的奶奶，在家里留着一口热饭等你。
subjectProfile: elderly Chinese grandmother in her seventies
kind smile, gentle wrinkles, soft silver hair
environment: dining table, kitchen window, steam from home-cooked food
lived-in domestic space with subtle nostalgic details
styleConstraints: same product-universe visual language across all relics
soft cinematic lighting, clean focal composition
high detail, polished textures, believable proportions
no text, no logo, no watermark, no readable UI
subtle skin texture and expressive eyes
variantFocus: scene-led storytelling with clear environment cues
single memorable focal subject or group
half-body portrait near dining table and kitchen window
soft evening light, storytelling background, one clear focal subject
promptAdditions: 那个永远担心你吃饭和睡觉的奶奶，在家里留着一口热饭等你。
natural realism, elegant composition, tender humanity
Chinese family memory, authentic domestic atmosphere
half-body portrait near dining table and kitchen window
soft evening light, storytelling background, one clear focal subject
